title: TussleCraft
description: This modpack is designed for the TussleCraft server made by Infamous GC. This modpack creates a uniquely difficult version of the game while maintaining a similar to vanilla feeling.
body:
## TussleCraft
TussleCraft is a modpack designed to increase to difficulty of Minecraft whilst maintaining a similar to vanilla feeling. This centers around increased mob difficulty, thirst, temperature, and many more features and smaller configuration changes.

Many players have surpassed the required level of skill to play minecraft. Thus the foundation of TussleCraft was formed. The mod additionally incorporates plenty of new structures and biomes to explore.

Please note that this modpack is best played on the TussleCraft server. However a fun gameplay can stille arise from a singleplayer world.
